pageDescription: Configure preferences, export data, and review data quality

about.title: About RUBLI
about.description: RUBLI (Red Unificada de Busqueda de Licitaciones Irregulares) is an AI-Powered Corruption Detection Platform for Mexican Government Procurement. Named after the unified network concept for detecting irregular procurement patterns across federal sectors.

export.limitsDescription: Exports are limited to {{count}} records by default. For larger exports, please contact the administrator or use the API directly.

contracts.title: Contracts
contracts.description: Export contract data with risk scores and classifications

vendors.title: Vendors
vendors.description: Export vendor profiles with risk metrics and classifications
